metadata.title: core implementation for dvr-like recorder
metadata.description: Replaces the existing video player with live video-recorder/playback, enabling pause and resume in classes. The PR includes a complete basic recording framework, Agora bridge integration, and DVR state management.
metadata.author: purposeno968-ui

additions: 78:     // Scope observer to app root instead of entire body if possible
631:     // Revoke previous URL to prevent memory leak
context: 68:     // Observe DOM mutations for SPA navigation, debounced to prevent memory/CPU spikes

issues.description: Massive memory leak - creating a new Blob from all recordedChunks every time the user seeks or enters DVR mode. Forces the browser to concatenate gigabytes of data into a brand new Blob in memory, causing massive CPU spikes and eventually crashing the tab.

Global MutationObserver - observing the entire document.body (or appRoot) with { childList: true, subtree: true } in a heavy React SPA causing hundreds of layout calculations per minute. The observer should be scoped to a narrower container instead.
